history.reviewer_notes_for_memory: R12 upgraded to 7.0 because (a) per-epoch adversary AUC + run.log artifacts now in repo (closes R11 #2), (b) hierarchical cross-seed CIs replace seed-internal CIs (closes R11 #4), (c) missingness-only probe (R12_missingness_probe.py) gives within-nonPH LR AUC=0.664 [0.599, 0.724] showing missingness alone leaks protocol — 31/32 dropped nonPH cases are plain-scan. Honest negative is sound. BUT: 'impossibility' framing too broad (applies only to corrected-GRL on legacy 243 cache, n=80 within-nonPH); 345-cohort PH=160 vs legacy PH=170 not reconciled by case_id; non-GRL comparator (CORAL/MMD/HSIC/IRM/propensity) not yet attempted. R13 must resolve the cohort discrepancy AND try a non-GRL deconfounder before claiming general impossibility.

history.reviewer_notes_for_memory: R11 has the right meta-science (multi-seed + bootstrap + MLP probe) but the asserted bug-fix code wasn't in the local repo at review time — reviewer caught this and downgraded to 5.0. The fix script is now committed (run_sprint6_v2_grl_fix.py). Substantive finding: even with corrected GRL + nonPH-only adversary + multi-seed, best protocol AUC is 0.80 (target 0.60). MLP probe shows 0.88 (non-linear leakage worse). Disease drops 0.73→0.64 at high λ. The GRL path is exhausted on n=80 within-nonPH stratum. Path forward requires either (a) more plain-scan nonPH data (100 new cases queued for ingestion), (b) full 282 cohort with degraded graphs, or (c) different deconfounding objective (CORAL/MMD/IRM).

reviewer_bugs_flagged: λ DOUBLE-SCALING: GradReverse.backward uses lambd AND loss multiplies by λ → encoder gradients scale ~λ². Must fix: either GRL=λ with unweighted CE, OR GRL=1 with λ*CE (not both).
OBJECTIVE MISMATCH: adversary trained on full cohort where PH≈contrast. Should be trained on nonPH-only OR class-conditional, to match the within-nonPH evaluation target.

Before claiming GRL fails, fix bugs + condition adversary on nonPH + multi-seed + adversary diagnostics.

Reproducibility red flags fixed post-review (script committed, env.yml synced to actual kimimaro 5.8.1).
